name: Cake Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugars, buttermilk, and egg; beat well.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (sugar replacement, nutmeg, cinnamon, flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt) to the mixture, stirring until just blended.
3. Heat oil in a deep pot or fryer to 375°F (190°C).
4. Drop dough using a doughnut dropper into the hot oil.
5. Fry the doughnuts until they are golden brown, turning occasionally.
6. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
Serving suggestion: 1 serving = 1 donut
